pattern: Tally how often each value appears, then ask whether any of those counts is a prime number.
hints: First reduce the array to a multiset of occurrence counts.
A frequency qualifies only if it is a prime; primality of small counts can be tested by trial division.
Build a frequency map, then check each distinct count for primality and return true as soon as one count is prime.

edge_inputs.description: all distinct so every frequency is one
one value appears twice, a prime count
a single element, frequency one is not prime
frequency four is composite, no prime count
all same value, frequency equals length

stress.description: 100 values over a narrow range to force varied frequencies
